items.title: [正面] Jogo impressionante, com jogabilidade ótima e uma ...
items.summary:
Jogo impressionante, com jogabilidade ótima e uma história ainda melhor.
Meu PC não é muito bom, mas o jogo é extremamente leve e, mesmo assim, não deixa os gráficos a desejar.
Com o passar do tempo, você vai se aprofundando cada vez mais na história e sentindo vontade de descobrir e desvendar todos os mistérios da trama.

O único ponto que não é tão bom é que o jogo é dublado por IA, e também é um gacha.
Mas, mesmo sendo um gacha, é possível montar times bons sem gastar dinheiro, sendo totalmente viável jogar como free-to-play.

Jogo ótimo.
Que a chave de prata guie o seu caminho!

items.title: [正面] Morimens is th kind of gacha game that I wish was ...
items.summary: Morimens is th kind of gacha game that I wish was more common. Without spending money, you can build great teams and are given many rewards to keep you engaged. Although I cannot speak for the endgame yet, I am thoroughly enjoying myself.

items.title: [负面] Too much gacha, not enough card game. To be clear,...
items.summary:
Too much gacha, not enough card game. To be clear, I'm not opposed to gacha games, but the main gameplay loop has to stand on its own. The UI is very poor for a card game: keywords aren't explained clearly (nor is it easy, IxD-wise, to get them to display), it's hard to tell who cards will target, translations are very poor (even ignoring the AI issue, the wording has to be _clear_ as to what will happen). New terms for old concepts aren't explained, giving the game a very alien feel.

If you can look past those things, there's probably a decent game here.

items.title: [正面] 骗氪手段简直是手游界天花板 小月卡 普通纪行 高级纪行 限时充值 篇章纪行 皮肤充值 首充奖励 累积...
items.summary: 骗氪手段简直是手游界天花板 小月卡 普通纪行 高级纪行 限时充值 篇章纪行 皮肤充值 首充奖励 累积冲销奖励 还有这个双专武30个+角色15命座，一个完全体角色光是抽ssr都需要45个，跟它比起来x神都眉清目秀的。很想喷，但是挺好玩。

items.title: [正面] Great roguelike deckbuilder game with gacha elemen...
items.summary: Great roguelike deckbuilder game with gacha elements. This game is very underrated and deserves much more attention. I especially like that there's no auto-battle and the game actually requires tactics to play. Please give it a try!

items.title: [正面]  A surprisingly engaging experience! The gameplay ...
items.summary: A surprisingly engaging experience! The gameplay is simple yet addictive, and the character progression feels rewarding. While not revolutionary, the game provides a solid and enjoyable way to spend some free time. Definitely worth checking out if you're looking for a fun, casual title.
